Bus Timings

Updated 21 Bus Schedule Al Quoz to Al Ghubaiba Bus Station

June 25, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

As everybody knows, Al Ghubaiba Bus Station is a major public transportation hub located in the heart of Dubai, close to the Dubai Creek and the historic Al Fahidi District. It serves as a central point for buses traveling to various parts of Dubai and other emirates.

And the 21 Bus in Dubai is an essential route connecting Al Ghubaiba Bus Station with Al Quoz, Clinical Pathology Services. This route is well-traveled, catering to both daily commuters and visitors exploring the city’s industrial and commercial areas. Contents

21 Bus Timetable

The 21 Bus operates daily with frequent service throughout the day to accommodate the high volume of passengers. The first bus from Al Ghubaiba starts early in the morning at 06.00 AM, and the service continues until late evening at 00.06.

It provides ample options for commuters to plan their travel. Typically, buses run every 15-20 minutes during peak hours and every 30 minutes during off-peak times. And here is the detail of 21 bus timetable From Al Quoz From Al Ghubaiba
  06:00 07:18
  06:20 07:38
  06:40 07:58
  07:00 08:18
  07:12 08:30
  07:26 08:44
  07:42 09:00
  08:00 09:18
  08:15 09:33
  08:30 09:48
  08:50 10:08
  09:10 10:28
  09:25 10:43
  09:40 10:58
  09:55 11:13
  10:10 11:28
  10:30 11:48
  10:55 12:13
  11:15 12:33
  11:30 12:48
  11:45 13:03
  12:05 13:23
  12:25 13:43
  12:45 14:03
  13:05 14:23
  13:25 14:43
  13:45 15:03
  14:00 15:18
  14:20 15:38
  14:40 15:58
  15:00 16:18
  15:15 16:33
  15:35 16:53
  15:50 17:08
  16:03 17:21
  16:14 17:32
  16:28 17:46
  16:43 18:01
  17:00 18:18
  17:20 18:38
  17:40 18:58
  18:00 19:18
  18:15 19:33
  18:35 19:53
  18:50 20:08
  19:05 20:23
  19:24 20:42
  19:40 20:58
  19:59 21:17
  20:19 21:37
  20:34 21:52
  20:48 22:06
  20:59 22:17
  21:19 22:37
  21:39 22:57
  21:58 23:16
  22:15 23:33
  22:25 23:43
  22:40 23:58
  22:55 00:13
  23:05 00:23
  23:20 00:38
  23:40 00:58
  00:05 01:23
  00:30 01:48
  • Sunday to Tuesday: Buses run from 06:00 AM to 12:06 AM with a frequency of 20 to 30 minutes.
  • Wednesday and Thursday: The operating hours are slightly extended to 00:15 AM with the same frequency.
  • Friday: The service starts earlier at 05:00 AM, with more frequent buses every 10 to 15 minutes to accommodate the increased demand during weekends.
  • Saturday: The service reverts to starting at 06:00 AM and runs until 00:06 AM, with buses arriving every 30 to 31 minutes.

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link to view the 21 Bus Timings.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Some other Dubai bus routes you can explore include the F46, which passes through Ibn Battuta and Dubai Investment Park, as well as the 50, which runs between Business Bay 2 and International City Bus Station.## 21 Bus Route

The 21 Bus covers a comprehensive route with numerous stops along the way. comhttps://cdn.emzeth.com/img/2024/06/21-Bus-Route. jpg)

  • Al Quoz, Clinical Pathology Services
  • Al Quoz, Galaxy Paper Industries
  • Al Quoz, Emirates Glass
  • Rigid Construction, Camps
  • Habtoor Equipment Corporation
  • Al Quoz Depot
  • Danways Emarat
  • Bahar Plastic Factory
  • Ducast Factory
  • Le Meridien Hotel Accommodation
  • Al Quoz, Gargash Construction Accommodation
  • Al Safa Metro Station
  • Oasis Center
  • Max Metro Station
  • ADCB Metro Station
  • BurJuman Metro Station
  • Sharaf DG Metro Station
  • Al Ghubaiba Bus Station

These stops ensure that passengers have access to a variety of commercial, residential, and industrial zones, making it a versatile choice for many commuters.Read Also: E201 Bus Timetable ## Journey Experience

The bus journey on route 21 from Al Quoz to Al Ghubaiba is a long but fascinating ride through some of Dubai’s most diverse areas. Starting in Al Quoz, known for its industrial feel and vibrant art galleries, the bus travels along major city routes, offering views of Dubai Canal and its modern waterfront developments.

Passing through the bustling Satwa district, with its lively streets and traditional shops, the journey ends in Al Ghubaiba, near the historic Dubai Creek. This area offers easy access to the Al Fahidi District and Dubai Museum, blending the city’s cultural heritage with its modern skyline. While the trip is lengthy, it offers a unique look at Dubai’s contrasting neighborhoods and key attractions, making it an interesting way to explore the city.## Conclusion

And the 21 bus timetable above will help you to know the timing of the bus departing. Whether you are a daily commuter or a visitor exploring the city, the 21 Bus provides an efficient and affordable travel option.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 25, 2025.
